summary: Completed full testing of Unified Partner Ecosystem Master Pack. All features working correctly - unified page with 4 form sections (Basics, Capabilities, Routing & Selection Rules, Performance Snapshot), type-aware form adapts for Service/Product partners, sidebar cleaned up with old fragmented links removed, deprecation note present.
seed_data_creation: Created test partner via Save Partner form (TEST_Unified_Partner_1774259674)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Partner Ecosystem Master Pack fully tested. Page at /admin/partner-ecosystem has 4 form sections: Basics (8 fields), Capabilities (type-aware), Routing & Selection Rules (5 fields + 2 checkboxes), Performance Snapshot (4 metrics). Sidebar cleaned up - old fragmented partner pages removed.

/admin/partner-ecosystem page renders un.details: Page loads with stats cards (Total Partners, Active, Service Partners, Product Partners) and Add Partner button

Basics section shows all required fields.details: Partner Name, Partner Type, Country, Status, Contact Person, Email, Phone, Region Coverage - all fields present

Capabilities section shows Service Group.details: Service Groups input and Specific Services textarea visible with placeholder text and helper note

Capabilities section shows Product Categ.details: Product Categories field and blue info box about stock management visible when Product Partner type selected

Routing & Selection Rules section shows.details: Routing Priority (dropdown), Quality Score (number), Success Rate % (number), Average Turnaround (days), Preferred Partner (checkbox), Temporarily Unavailable (checkbox) - all present

Performance Snapshot section shows all m.details: Active Jobs (0), Completed Jobs (0), Overdue Jobs (0), Last Update (—) - all metrics displayed

Admin sidebar shows Partner Ecosystem wi.details: Partner Ecosystem link present. Old links removed: Partners List, Partner Catalog, Routing Rules, Service Capabilities

Save Partner creates partner via API and.details: Form submission successful - form closes after save, partner list refreshes with new partner

Table/Card toggle works.details: Table view shows columns (Partner, Type, Specific Services, Priority, Quality, Turnaround, Status). Cards view shows partner cards with same info

Deprecation Note visible at bottom.details: Deprecation Note section visible with 4 bullet points about old pages being replaced
